defs: As something foreign, or not one's own; in a manner adapted to something foreign and strange.
In the manner of one who does not know another; distantly; reservedly; coldly.
quotes: You all look strangely on me.
I do in justice charge thee . . . That thou commend it strangely to some place Where chance may nurse or end it.

defs: In a strange manner; in a manner or degree to excite surprise or wonder; wonderfully.
quotes: How strangely active are the arts of peace!
It would strangely delight you to see with what spirit he converses.
